findings.issue: Mock broadcastToRoom never tests error handling — tests assume infallible broadcasts
findings.recommendation: Add tests where broadcastToRoom throws, verify message creation still succeeds
Add ownership verification tests for cross-user operations

findings.issue: Module-level mocks shared across tests — mockResolvedValueOnce mutations can bleed
findings.recommendation: Move mock creation to beforeEach factory function

findings.issue: Test name exclude self-mentions is misleading — actually tests UUID parsing
findings.recommendation: Rename test and add real self-mention test with valid UUID senderId

findings.issue: Race condition: waitForMessage() does not filter by event type, promises may resolve out-of-order
findings.recommendation: Add event-type filtering parameter to waitForMessage()
Add test for lastReadMessage from wrong conversation

findings.issue: No senderId spoofing prevention — controller accepts arbitrary senderId without auth validation
WebSocket gateway has zero access control — any user can join any conversation
Raw JSON.parse() without try-catch — project rule requires safeJsonParse()
findings.recommendation: Wrap in try-catch or use safeJsonParse utility

findings.issue: No tests for invalid WebSocket DTOs (null, missing fields, wrong types)
findings.recommendation: Add negative e2e tests for malformed WS messages

findings.issue: Typing events accept any userId without participant verification
findings.recommendation: Verify userId is active participant before broadcasting typing

findings.issue: No content validation tests (empty, null, oversized messages)
findings.recommendation: Add boundary condition tests for message content

findings.issue: TypeScript compilation error: Buffer.concat(raw) type mismatch (TS2345)
Missing afterEach cleanup for WebSocket connections — leaked connections on test failure
findings.recommendation: Add afterEach hook to close all WS clients and clear timeouts

findings.issue: Mock ParticipantService missing 3 methods vs actual interface (create, findOne, update, remove)
findings.recommendation: Align mock with actual service interface

findings.issue: WS helper functions not centralized — should be in test/helpers/ws-setup.ts per project pattern
findings.recommendation: Extract helpers to test/helpers/ws-setup.ts and export
